judge_result.short_rationale: Answer matches the canonical inhalation steps in the correct order: remove from contaminated area, keep at rest, and seek medical attention if symptoms develop or persist. The added do-not-work warning is grounded in the source. Although the separate escalation line says to seek care quickly, the main step correctly preserves the conditional trigger, so no critical safety issue.
